steps.title: Identify the strongest signal
steps.content: The decisive signal is “both” combined with “when she collected” — together they demand showing the timing of both collections relative to each other.

steps.title: Find the temporal emphasis
steps.content:
D establishes this temporal relationship with “after”: June 1930 came after May 1929, showing when both samples were collected in sequence.
  • A focuses on current location
  • B on where they were found
  • C on a single specimen's date
. That matches choice D — D is correct.
